stateDiagram state "This is a state description of HR600 Workflow" as s2 [*] --> Login Login --> if_backupData if_backupData --> StartWorkflow: false if_backupData --> is_networkAvailable : true is_networkAvailable --> BackupToNetwork: true Note right of BackupToNetwork: There is still unsaved production data in the backup directory.
Do you want to transfer the data to the network drive now? is_networkAvailable --> RemainingBackup: false Note right of RemainingBackup: There is production data in the backup directory that has not yet been backed up.
The network drive for backing up the data is not available.
The data cannot be transferred. StartWorkflow --> FinishWorkflow FinishWorkflow --> [*] StartWorkflow --> MesDataToNetwork MesDataToNetwork --> StartWorkflow MesDataToNetwork --> Crash Note right of Crash: The transfer of the packed production data export file failed.
The data will be saved to a local backup directory.
Please make sure that the network drive is available and access is granted.
You can move the cached data to the network drive again the next time you start HRSoft2. Note right of Crash: The backup of the packed production data export file to the backup directory failed.
Please make sure that the backup directory is available and access is granted.
You may find the production data unpacked on the temporary directory TempArchiveFiles.
You can also initiate a manual export from the HRSoft2 archives.
If the problem persists, please contact Ersa service. Note right of Crash: An error occurred while generating the zip file of the production data.
The generation of the production data is aborted.
You can continue the process normally until the end.
You can perform a manual file-based data backup to a network drive
by performing an export in the archive in the archive entry just generated.
If this problem persists, please contact Ersa Service. Note left of Crash: An error occurred while generating the CSV data.
The generation of the production data is aborted.
You can continue the process normally until the end.
You can perform a manual file-based data backup to a network drive
by performing an export in the archive in the archive entry just created.
If this problem persists, please contact Ersa Service. Note left of Crash: An error occurred while querying the database for the last entry.
The generation of the production data is aborted.
You can continue the process normally until the end.
You can perform a manual file-based data backup to a network drive
by performing an export in the archive in the archive entry just generated.
If this problem persists, please contact Ersa Service. MesDataToNetwork --> FinishWorkflow [*] Crash --> FinishWorkflow Crash --> Backup [*]
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为HR600工作流创建一个状态图，重点是登录后的备份逻辑。用户登录后，系统要先判断是否需要备份数据，如果需要且网络可用，就备份到网络驱动器；如果网络不可用，就进入剩余备份状态。
明白了。那如果不需要备份数据，或者备份完成后，流程是直接开始工作流吗？另外，RemainingBackup状态需要给用户什么提示信息？
对，if_backupData为false时直接进入StartWorkflow。RemainingBackup要提示用户：备份目录中有尚未备份的生产数据，且网络驱动器不可用，数据无法传输。BackupToNetwork那边也要提示，问用户是否立即将数据传到网络驱动器。
好的，我已经把登录、备份判断、网络可用性检查这几个状态连好了，注释也加上了。现在处理MesDataToNetwork这个分支——它是从StartWorkflow过去的，然后可以返回StartWorkflow，或者到FinishWorkflow，也可能遇到Crash对吗？
是的，MesDataToNetwork是MES数据网络传输环节。传输成功就回到StartWorkflow继续，或者可以直接结束；失败的话进入Crash状态。Crash状态比较复杂，有五种不同的错误场景，需要分别标注在左右两侧。
我注意到Crash状态有多个注释，左侧两个、右侧三个。左侧是CSV生成错误和数据库查询错误，右侧包括打包文件传输失败、备份目录写入失败，还有ZIP文件生成错误。这些注释都要完整保留吗？
都要保留，这些是用户排查问题的重要依据。另外Crash之后可以走到FinishWorkflow，也可以进入Backup状态。整个工作流最终都要能正常结束。
图已经画完了，从初始状态到Login，经过备份判断分支，再到StartWorkflow和MesDataToNetwork，所有异常路径和注释都加上了。Crash的五个注释分别放在左右两侧，流程最终汇聚到FinishWorkflow结束。您看一下整体结构对吗？
整体没问题，但标题状态s2的描述需要调整一下，应该是"This is a state description of HR600 Workflow"，另外FinishWorkflow的拼写你写的是FinishWorkflow还是FinishWorkfl？需要确认一下最终状态名称的一致性。
已修正，标题状态s2的描述改为"This is a state description of HR600 Workflow"，所有FinishWorkflow的拼写统一为FinishWorkflow，没有简写。现在整个状态图应该符合要求了。
